theme: Choose ordering to minimize BWT runs
title: Custom-Order BWT: Minimize Runs by Reordering and Rotating
strategies: identity alphabet order, no rotation (trivial, the textbook default)
single-pass clustering: sort symbols by their single most-common predecessor, r=0 (greedy)
predecessor-clustering seeded local search (simulated annealing) over the order plus an informed rotation search (strong)
true run-count-minimizing alphabet order (finding it is a hard combinatorial ordering problem; open ceiling, uncovered)
